substrate: frozen Neuro-JEPA (ViT-B MoE) 768-d embeddings of OpenBHB quasi-raw MNI152 T1w volumes
interpretation: The frozen Neuro-JEPA representation ITSELF predicts scanner field strength on real healthy multi-site brains with no disease signal. Even reduced to 10 PCA components (no p>>n overfitting), AUC stays ~0.93 — the batch effect the referee gates against, measured on the foundation model's own embeddings.
honesty_note: Raw 768-d AUC (~0.998) is inflated by p>>n (768 features, 96 subjects); the PCA-reduced numbers are the defensible estimate. Reported both.
compliance: Frozen inference only (no fine-tuning; not a derivative of the CC-BY-NC-ND weights). Weights never stored in repo; embedding table git-ignored, not redistributed.
provenance: Neuro-JEPA NYUMedML/Neuro-JEPA (gated, CC-BY-NC-ND) over benoit-dufumier/openBHB quasi-raw MNI152 (Apache-2.0); metadata from OpenBHB participants.tsv.
